hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | grep -Eq 'gh[[:space:]]+pr[[:space:]]+(create|edit|ready|reopen)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"Team convention (this repo): a pull request was just created or updated — monitor its CI and report the result so nobody has to check manually. Use gh pr checks <number> --watch (or poll gh pr view <number> --json statusCheckRollup), then summarize which checks passed or failed."}}' || true
